Phase-21.NAME: MyGRACE Verification and Documentation Cleanup
Phase-21.goal: Bring active MyGRACE documents and verification surfaces back in sync with the current Full Tunnel architecture without changing runtime behavior.

scope.included: Indexes, per-module docs, per-verification docs, README handoff, obsolete test references, and active phase references.
scope.excluded: Runtime feature changes, deployment script changes, install script changes, and VPN topology changes.

active-cleanup.item-1: backend/tests/test_route_decision_api.py still verifies deleted route-policy endpoints and imports removed routing models.
active-cleanup.item-2: backend/tests/test_admin_stats.py still expects policy_dns_observer on the admin router.
active-cleanup.item-3: backend/tests/test_dns_observer.py, test_domain_rule_store.py, test_route_policy_resolver.py, test_routing_policy_compat.py, and test_ru_ipset_updater.py target removed split-tunnel support modules.
active-cleanup.item-4: V-M-006 still points at deleted route-policy behavior and must be replaced with current admin/system/device verification.
active-cleanup.item-5: README and AGENTS project summary still use split-tunneling wording that can mislead handoff agents.

historical-or-superseded.item-1: Phase-1, Phase-2, Phase-3, Phase-4, Phase-15, Phase-16, and Phase-17 may retain historical references only when explicitly archived or superseded.
historical-or-superseded.item-2: V-M-007 and V-M-017 references to ipset/split-tunnel are valid only as regression assertions that removed artifacts do not return.
historical-or-superseded.item-3: Graph hotspots H-003 and H-004 are valid regression warnings for Full Tunnel cleanup.

Phase-21.step-1: Audit active docs for stale M-013 through M-016 references and classify each as active, archived, or superseded.
Phase-21.step-2: Replace active split-tunnel/ipset/policy verification expectations with current Full Tunnel expectations.
Phase-21.step-3: Update admin verification so V-M-006 checks current admin/system/device behavior instead of deleted route-policy surfaces.
Phase-21.step-4: Make backend test collection clean by archiving or rewriting obsolete tests for removed routing modules.
Phase-21.step-5: Synchronize graph CrossLinks, plan-index, verification-index, README handoff, and per-entity files.
Phase-21.step-6: Run MyGRACE integrity verification and record which checks are local-only versus requiring live VPS evidence.

verification.check-1: All active XML files parse successfully.
verification.check-2: Every graph-index entry has a matching docs/modules file and verification ref.
verification.check-3: Backend pytest collection succeeds before feature work resumes.
verification.check-4: No runtime files are changed unless a later approved execution phase requires it.

execution-evidence.local-check-1: Parsed 103 active XML files outside docs/archive with 0 failures.
execution-evidence.local-check-2: Dependency CrossLink audit reported 0 missing DEPENDS CrossLinks.
execution-evidence.local-check-3: Index count/file audit reported 0 errors for graph modules, plan phases, and verification entries.
execution-evidence.local-check-4: mygrace lint reported 0 errors and 0 warnings.
execution-evidence.local-check-5: Backend pytest collection reported 106 tests collected with 0 collection errors.
execution-evidence.live-vps-check-1: Live VPS evidence is not required for Phase-21 because changes are documentation, index, and test-archive cleanup only.
execution-evidence.live-vps-check-2: Live VPS or restore-target evidence remains required for future disaster-recovery and deployment-readiness phases.
